title: Prove and minimally correct r25 empty/error behavior
objective: Compare the intended r25 spec from DASH_014 against the current _read_state() implementation, then apply the smallest correct fix if current behavior is wrong.

deliverables.label: Prove current behavior versus intended spec
deliverables.change: Verify whether empty/error cases return null-safe values or ambiguous zeroed fallbacks.

deliverables.label: Minimal fix if needed
deliverables.change: If current behavior is wrong, return win_rate/expectancy as null when no closed trades exist, and make DB-error fallback explicit rather than pretending a real zero-performance sample.

acceptance_criteria: r25 behavior is clearly proven or corrected
empty/error cases behave intentionally, not ambiguously
result explains exactly what changed or what was proven
